name: Jam Kolaches
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cream the butter and cream cheese together using an electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the flour to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
3. Roll the dough into a sheet that is 1/8-inch thick on a lightly floured surface.
4. Cut out rounds with a 2-1/2-inch cookie cutter.
5. Place the rounds on lightly greased cookie sheets.
6. Spoon 1/4 teaspoon of strawberry jam onto each cookie.
7. Fold the opposite sides to meet at the center, slightly overlapping the edges.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
9. Cool on wire racks.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
Yield: about 3-1/2 dozen.
